svg.text: Multi-agent document verification desk · Modular monolith with an event-driven agent core · reverse-engineered from source
enqueued by POST /run — request returns immediately (async)
HTTPS egress · image ≤1024px JPEG q80 · strict JSON · key in header · throttled + cached
solid — synchronous request (HTTP · DB query · agent message · LLM API call)
dotted — live / async / storage (WSS feed · event broadcast · file I/O · static serve)
· Not present (do not assume): message broker · Redis · Kubernetes · CDN/LB as code · OAuth/SSO · scheduler · CI/CD · Alembic. mock = fully offline.
